metadata.description: Company-wide standards, skills, and rules for using Claude across every team: engineering, architecture, marketing, product, and data.

plugins.name: company-core
plugins.description: Baseline everyone installs: brand voice, communication standards, security & confidentiality rules, and shared glossary.

plugins.name: engineering
plugins.description: Coding standards, code review, testing, git/PR workflow, and secure coding for software engineers.

plugins.name: architecture
plugins.description: System design, architecture decision records (ADRs), and technology selection guidance.

plugins.name: marketing
plugins.description: Content writing, SEO, campaign briefs, and social copy that stay on-brand.

plugins.name: product
plugins.description: Product requirements docs, user stories, and release notes.

plugins.name: data
plugins.description: SQL standards, analysis methodology, and dashboard/reporting conventions.
